title: Premium Yi Peng Night: Hour-by-Hour Schedule
desc: A typical CAD Heritage premium evening on Yi Peng night in Chiang Mai, from hotel pickup at 1:00 PM to lantern release at 8:30 PM.

steps.label: 1:00 PM — Hotel pickup
steps.desc: Shuttle buses collect guests from designated hotels. Arrive early; festival-night traffic in Chiang Mai is heavy.

steps.label: 4:00 PM — Entry & parallel activities
steps.desc: Ticket check, then a 90-minute window for Lanna dance, handicraft workshops, lantern-decorating, and photo zones.

steps.label: 6:00 PM — Khantoke dinner
steps.desc: Traditional northern Thai (Khantoke-style) buffet. VIP and Elite ticket holders dine in separate assigned seating.

steps.label: 7:30 PM — Opening ceremony
steps.desc: Cultural performances, then 20 minutes of Buddhist chanting led by monks, followed by a 10-minute group meditation.

steps.label: 8:30 PM — Lantern release
steps.desc: On a single signal, every guest releases a sky lantern simultaneously, followed by krathongs floating on the water.
